title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 29 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore futures market strengthened in a volatile manner today, with the main contract I2609 ultimately closingat 783.5 RMB/ton, up 0.45% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices rose slightly by 3-5 RMB/ton compared to yesterday. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm for quoting; steel mills purchased on a need-to basis; as the weekend approached, overall market trading activity was subdued.
